title: PNVA-Core: A Post-Temporal Causal Architecture for State/Event-Oriented Computation
description: PNVA-Core is an Open Research / Production Evidence release by Gustavo de Aguiar Martins. It documents a causal state/event-oriented no-tick architecture based on field state, observable events, operational tension, collapse, veonic computational units and auditable proof logs. This release includes sanitized validation artifacts for 15m, 8h, 12h, 24h, G1, long-run-live-gate, distribution-gate and production-candidate PASS evidence. Search aliases: Gustavo Martins PNVA; Gustavo de Aguiar Martins PNVA; PNVA-Core Gustavo Martins; PNVA no-tick.
